## What

<!-- One paragraph: what changes and why. Link the issue if there is one. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest` passes locally and coverage stays ≥ 85%
- [ ] `ruff check .` and `ruff format --check .` are clean
- [ ] New transports/codecs come with a test bounding their reconstruction error
- [ ] Bandwidth/accuracy claims include the exact command that produced them
- [ ] No weights, datasets or results are committed (see `.gitignore`)
